payload.idea:
Lets look at the rendered codebase and lets raise the code to a higher standard, Im looking for extreamly well defined and documented components within a components directory, I want to use tanstack query as a layer between the ipc calls and the react so that there is a sensible state management layer for the data

I just want to raise the bar as this application is becoming something production capable so I want to ensure that we create these common components like inputs, cards, buttons, dropdowns as super clean and centralised comonent that is used everywhere for consistency

result.title: Centralize renderer UI primitives and move IPC data state to TanStack Query
